title: Subtle Name Tags
description: A mod that makes name tags render only when needed to allow stealth and reduce screen clutter.
body:
No more blowing your cover by accidentally uncrouching!

Subtle Name Tags makes name tags only render when:
1. close enough to the entity
2. looking in the general direction of the entity
3. there are no obstacles between you and the entity


All of the features are totally configurable by the client.

This aims to make nametag rendering a more deliberate and intentional thing rather than always being there cluttering your screen.
